message:
test(core): add V1 zero-copy page access e2e regression test suite (9 tests)

V-TEST-1: Comprehensive tests verifying correctness after V1.1 (cell
pointer Vec), V1.2 (page cache get_shared), V1.4 (register subtype
bool flag), and V1.6 (CursorSlots flat array) optimizations.

Tests cover: 10K row INSERT correctness, secondary index integrity,
INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE lifecycle, multi-cursor JOINs, prepared statement
cursor reuse, read-after-write consistency, JSON subtype functions,
large table page splits, and autocommit read consistency.

All 9 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
